SHORT NAME: CLM_CNTL_NUM 

LONG NAME: CLM_CNTL_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 23 

SOURCE: CMS Encounter Data System (EDS) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Multiple iterations of a single service (i.e., a particular type of claim for a specific service date for the 
person) are present in the encounter RIFs; records are not limited to the final version of the encounter
